title: Add MLX knobs for record config parity
author: FlorinelTudor

data.scope: specific large tensors via float passthrough

data.description: Adds explicit support for configuring MLP_HIDDEN in the MLX trainer to better match public record configs.
Allows selected large tensors to bypass int8 serialization and remain in float via INT8_KEEP_FLOAT_LARGE_NAME_PATTERNS.

novel_contributions: Adds explicit MLP_HIDDEN support to train_gpt_mlx.py
Allows specific large tensors to remain float during int8 serialization using INT8_KEEP_FLOAT_LARGE_NAME_PATTERNS
Adds focused MLX tests covering both behaviors
Brings the MLX trainer closer to public record configs for more faithful Apple Silicon experiments
